response: The British rock band Dire Straits released the album *Brothers in Arms* in 1985, which also featured a song with the same title, "Brothers in Arms." The album was their fifth studio release and charted at number one worldwide, while the song was originally written in 1982, the year of the Falklands War, and was re-released in 2007 as a special edition to commemorate the 25th anniversary of the conflict.
